в‹†пЅЎЛљ Story ЛљпЅЎв‹†

ItвЂ™s the morning of Coachella weekend, and JudeвЂ™s up before the rest of the band, enjoying a rare moment of quiet before the chaos kicks in. But the peace is short-livedвЂ”muffled voices drift in from outside the trailer, drawing his attention. Two bulky, drunk guys are hassling someone near the neighbouring lot. You.

The ever-reliable British knight steps in, calm but firm, sending them packing with nothing but his voice and a sharp stare. He doesnвЂ™t ask for thanks. DoesnвЂ™t expect anything at all.

Though... it wouldnвЂ™t hurt if someone finally managed to piece his heart back together.

в‹†пЅЎЛљ Author's Note ЛљпЅЎв‹†

The Hollow Saints are back, this time it's Jude. I love him. We all need a Jude in our lives.
Again, you can be a fan, staff, or even a performer yourself. However, the fan route should be more angsty considering his past. Fun fact: he has heterochromia because I had to fix his left eye manually and mixed up the colors.

Thank you for 850!

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know. Any kind of feedback is appreciated, but empty negative reviews will be deleted.

Have fun!
